features: 4 Protected AC Power Outlets: This 13A/Max. 3120W Load Extension Lead will convert one plug socket outlet into 4 individual sockets, which enables you to plug up to 4 different low powered devices simultaneously. Ideal for using in home, offices, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected.

Surge Protection: Built with high-quality components and enhanced circuitry, anti-thunder protection and surge protection, this power strip is protected against over-voltage, over-current, short-circuiting, overload, offering more safety for household electric appliances and a peaceful mind while charging.

Safety Guarantee: UKCA,CE, BS1363-2/A Approved. We adopt anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.

Space-saving Design: The compact and lightweight design with mounting hole on the back make the extension lead able to fix on the wall and 3 metre length cable is long enough to reach your powered devices. Ideal for charging multiple appliances from distance in a large office or room.
What You Get: ExtraStar 4 Gang Surge-protected Extension Lead*1 and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description EXTRASTAR was established in 2009 and aims to provide a high-quality product of home improvement products, including 2/4/6/8 way extension lead, plug converters, Lights, indoor timer plugs, cable reels, and pedestal fans. Every purchase of an EXTRASTAR product comes with the following: Quick and friendly customer support Quality and reliability you can trust ExtraStar 4 Way Extension Lead with Surge Protection, 13A/250V~ Multi Sockets Power Strips. 4 Way Outlets Surge Protected 1M/2M/3M/5M Length to Choose Cord Size: H05VV-F 3G1.25mm² 13A 250V Max. 3120W Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Four-way socket This board has four three-pin jacks that meet British standards, which can effectively alleviate the problem of too many appliances and not enough sockets in your home, helping you to work and live more comfortably. Multiple Sizes The power cord of this board has four lengths of 1M/2M/3M/5M to choose from, and there is always one that can meet your needs! Safety Shutter The socket has a built-in safety protection shutters, which prevent effectively children's fingers or other foreign objects from being inserted, reducing the hidden danger. Surge Protection The plug board has built-in surge protection which protects household appliances from being damaged in the case of circuit surge, giving you more peace of mind and safety when using electricity.
